login.title: Connect Dexcom account
login.instructions:
Use the Dexcom account of the person wearing the sensor (the same login they use in the G6/G7/ONE/ONE+ app).

Dexcom Share must be turned on in that app, with at least one active follower configured.
login.genericError: Could not sign in to Dexcom Share.

glucoseDashboard.pickUser: Pick a user in widget settings
